faqs.question: How much does bed bug treatment cost in Hackensack, NJ?
faqs.answer: Bed bug treatment in Hackensack typically ranges from $1,200 to $3,500 depending on the size of your property, severity of infestation, and treatment method required. We offer free inspections and provide detailed quotes with no hidden fees before beginning any treatment.

faqs.question: How long does bed bug treatment take in Hackensack?
faqs.answer: Most bed bug treatments in Hackensack take 4-8 hours for heat treatment or require 2-3 visits for chemical applications spaced 2-3 weeks apart. Heat treatments offer same-day results, while chemical treatments ensure all life cycles are eliminated. We'll recommend the best approach based on your specific situation.

faqs.question: Do I need to leave my Hackensack home during bed bug treatment?
faqs.answer: For heat treatments, you'll need to vacate for 6-8 hours while we raise temperatures to 120-135°F to kill all bed bugs and eggs. Chemical treatments require leaving for 4-6 hours after application. We provide detailed preparation instructions and work around your schedule to minimize disruption.

faqs.question: Are bed bug treatments safe for my family and pets in Hackensack?
faqs.answer: Yes, all our bed bug treatments are completely safe when applied by our licensed professionals. We use EPA-registered products and follow strict safety protocols. Heat treatments are chemical-free, and for chemical applications, spaces are safe to re-enter once dried and ventilated according to our guidelines.
